description: Ranked tier of ORGANVM repositories with discovered latent value. Repos are promoted here once a value thesis is recorded in their DISCOVERY.md.

repos.thesis: The Director Engine — a deterministic, dial-parameterized creative-generation capability (three-axis dial schema + modulated system prompt + fixed narrative grammar + automated linter) proven across two seasons; packageable as a consumable estate asset for Organ II's generative siblings. Secondary: publishable serialized-horror IP with an existing pitch deck.
repos.first_task: Extract and package the Director Engine into engine/engine.json — a versioned contract wiring director_persona.md, core_loop.md, physics.md, and giallo_check.py into one callable generate+validate module.
